# DO NOT EDIT THIS FILE - It is automatically generated by the Monarchy Law Auto Replacer
# See the `tools` folder in the mod's root directory

REPLACE:je_meiji_restoration_update_japanese_emperor = {
    if = {
        limit = {
            has_variable = emperor_var
        }
        remove_variable = emperor_var
    }
    if = {
        limit = {
            any_scope_character = {
                has_trait = special_character_japanese_emperor
            }
        }
        random_scope_character = {
            limit = {
                has_trait = special_character_japanese_emperor
            }
            save_temporary_scope_as = emperor_var_scope
        }
        set_variable = {
            name = emperor_var
            value = scope:emperor_var_scope
        }
    }
    else_if = {
        limit = {
            is_revolutionary = yes
            country_definition = c:JAP.country_definition
            c:JAP ?= {
                any_scope_character = {
                    has_trait = special_character_japanese_emperor
                }
            }
        }
        c:JAP ?= {
            random_scope_character = {
                limit = {
                    has_trait = special_character_japanese_emperor
                }
                save_temporary_scope_as = emperor_var_scope
            }
        }
        set_variable = {
            name = emperor_var
            value = scope:emperor_var_scope
        }
    }
    else_if = { # Something has gone very wrong. We need a new Emperor, stat.
        limit = {
            RRK_st_has_monarchy_or_variant = yes
            NOT = {
                any_scope_character = {
                    has_trait = special_character_japanese_emperor
                }
            }
        }
        create_character = {
            template = JAP_backup_emperor_template
            save_temporary_scope_as = emperor_var_scope
        }
        if = {
            limit = {
                NOT = {
                    has_law = law_type:law_bakufu
                }
            }
            scope:emperor_var_scope ?= {
                set_character_as_ruler = yes
            }
        }
        set_variable = {
            name = emperor_var
            value = scope:emperor_var_scope
        }
    }
}
